title: conyza alata
intro: Conyza alata, also known as narrow-leaved fleabane, is a plant species in the daisy family that has been used for its medicinal and culinary purposes. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and respiratory problems, due to their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Conyza alata has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Conyza alata are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
